moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The world's most prestigious tennis tournament, Wimbledon, begins on Monday, June 29, 2026, at the All England Club in London, running for two weeks.

angles.name: General excitement
angles.copy: Get ready for strawberries, cream and world-class tennis! Wimbledon 2026 kicks off tomorrow, bringing two weeks of unmissable action. Who are you backing for the title?

angles.name: London focus
angles.copy: Centre Court calls! Wimbledon begins tomorrow in SW19, drawing tennis fans from across the globe. The buzz around London is real!

angles.name: Devon local angle
angles.copy: Devon tennis fans, it's almost time! Wimbledon 2026 starts tomorrow. Will we see any local talent making a splash this year?

moments.title: England's World Cup Round of 32
moments.blurb: England faces DR Congo in their FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 32 match on Wednesday, July 1, 2026, in Atlanta, with kick-off at 5pm BST.

angles.name: Match anticipation
angles.copy: The World Cup journey continues! England takes on DR Congo in the Round of 32 this Wednesday. Can the Three Lions roar into the next stage?

angles.name: Fan excitement
angles.copy: Midweek football fever! Clear your diaries for Wednesday, July 1st, as England plays their World Cup Round of 32 match. Where will you be watching?

moments.title: Wales Rugby vs Fiji
moments.blurb: Wales begins their inaugural Nations Championship campaign against Fiji at Cardiff City Stadium on Saturday, July 4, 2026.

angles.name: Welsh game day build-up
angles.copy: It's almost here! Wales kick off their Nations Championship against Fiji this Saturday at Cardiff City Stadium. Who's ready for some rugby action?

angles.name: Local excitement
angles.copy: The Red Wall meets the rugby pitch! Wales take on Fiji in Cardiff this Saturday. Expect a huge atmosphere in the capital!

moments.title: Northern Ireland School Summer Holidays
moments.blurb: School summer holidays in Northern Ireland officially begin on Wednesday, July 1, 2026.

angles.name: Holiday excitement
angles.copy: Freedom! Northern Ireland schools break up for summer holidays this Wednesday. What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Travel plans
angles.copy: Traffic alert! Northern Ireland schools are out for summer from Wednesday. Heading off on a staycation or abroad?

moments.title: Scotland School Summer Holidays
moments.blurb: Summer school holidays in Scotland begin on Thursday, July 2, 2026.

angles.name: Scottish holiday start
angles.copy: School's out for summer in Scotland from Thursday! Get ready for sunshine (hopefully!) and adventures. What's first on your holiday to-do list?

angles.name: Family fun
angles.copy: Parents in Scotland, the summer holidays officially begin on Thursday! Time to plan some family fun. Any hidden gems you're visiting?

moments.title: JD Cymru Leagues Fixture Release
moments.blurb: The Phase One fixtures for the 2026/27 JD Cymru Premier campaign will be announced on Thursday, July 2, 2026, with JD Cymru North and South fixtures following on July 3.

angles.name: Fixture anticipation
angles.copy: The wait is almost over! The 2026/27 JD Cymru Premier fixtures drop this Thursday, with North & South following Friday. Who are you hoping your team plays first?

angles.name: Local club focus
angles.copy: Get ready for the new season! JD Cymru League fixtures are out this week. Which local derbies are you looking forward to most?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Nicole Scherzinger
moments.blurb: Singer, dancer, and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger, known for The Pussycat Dolls, turns 48 on Monday, June 29.

angles.name: Pussycat Dolls tribute
angles.copy: Happy 48th Birthday to the incredible Nicole Scherzinger! From Pussycat Dolls anthems to solo hits, she's always brought the fire. What's your favourite Nicole track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ralf Hütter
moments.blurb: Ralf Hütter, co-founder and lead vocalist of electronic music pioneers Kraftwerk, celebrates his 80th birthday on Tuesday, June 30.

angles.name: Kraftwerk influence
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 80th Birthday to Ralf Hütter of Kraftwerk! A true visionary who shaped electronic music as we know it. Which Kraftwerk track is your ultimate synth anthem?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Missy Elliott
moments.blurb: The iconic rapper, singer, and producer Missy Elliott turns 55 on Wednesday, July 1.

angles.name: Hip-hop legend
angles.copy: Get your freak on! Happy 55th Birthday to the legendary Missy Elliott! Her influence on music and culture is undeniable. What's your favourite Missy video?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Deborah Harry
moments.blurb: Blondie's legendary frontwoman Deborah Harry celebrates her 81st birthday on Wednesday, July 1.

angles.name: Blondie icon
angles.copy: Call Me! Wishing a very Happy 81st Birthday to the one and only Deborah Harry. A true rock icon and fashion pioneer. What's your go-to Blondie track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Lindsay Lohan
moments.blurb: Actress and singer Lindsay Lohan, known for Mean Girls and her pop hits, turns 40 on Thursday, July 2.

angles.name: Pop culture icon
angles.copy: You go, Glen Coco! Happy 40th Birthday to Lindsay Lohan! From teen movie queen to pop star, she's done it all. What's your favourite Lindsay Lohan moment?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Post Malone
moments.blurb: Grammy-nominated rapper and singer Post Malone celebrates his 31st birthday on Saturday, July 4.

angles.name: Modern hitmaker
angles.copy: Cheers to 31! Happy Birthday to the one and only Post Malone! Always delivering the bangers. What's your favourite Posty track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday RZA
moments.blurb: Legendary producer and Wu-Tang Clan leader RZA turns 57 on Sunday, July 5.

angles.name: Wu-Tang mastermind
angles.copy: Protect Ya Neck! Happy 57th Birthday to the genius behind Wu-Tang Clan, RZA. His beats changed the game. What's your favourite RZA-produced track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Huey Lewis
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, celebrates his 76th birthday on Sunday, July 5.

angles.name: 80s hitmaker
angles.copy: It's The Power Of Love! Happy 76th Birthday to Huey Lewis! An 80s icon with timeless hits. What's your favourite Huey Lewis and the News song?

moments.title: Happy Birthday 50 Cent
moments.blurb: Rapper, actor, and entrepreneur 50 Cent turns 51 on Monday, July 6.

angles.name: Hip-hop mogul
angles.copy: Go Shorty, It's Your Birthday! Happy 51st to the one and only 50 Cent! Still running the game. What's your favourite 50 Cent track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ringo Starr
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday on Tuesday, July 7.

angles.name: Beatles legend
angles.copy: Peace and Love! Happy 86th Birthday to the iconic Ringo Starr! The beat behind the biggest band in history. What's your favourite Beatles song featuring Ringo?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Beck
moments.blurb: Multi-award-winning musician Beck, known for his eclectic style, turns 56 on Wednesday, July 8.

angles.name: Alternative icon
angles.copy: Where it's at! Happy 56th Birthday to the brilliant and eclectic Beck! A true musical innovator. What's your favourite Beck album?

moments.title: The Open Championship: Practice Rounds Begin
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale will see practice rounds commence from Sunday, July 12, 2026, leading up to the main tournament from July 16-19.

angles.name: Golf excitement
angles.copy: The countdown to The Open is on! Practice rounds kick off at Royal Birkdale from July 12th. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug this year?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale focus
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is getting ready! The 154th Open Championship's practice days start from July 12th. Get set for some links golf drama!
